review: Best coffee in the entire Majitar area. The cappuccino was rich and the ambiance is so relaxing.
Loved the peaceful environment. Perfect place to sit and work. Wifi could be better though.
Nice coffee and calm surroundings. The snacks menu is limited but what they have is good.
Overpriced for what you get. A simple coffee costs way too much compared to other places here.
Average experience. The coffee was okay but the staff were not very friendly.
Wonderful little cafe. The cold coffee is amazing and the view outside is beautiful.
Service was extremely slow. Waited 25 minutes for a simple coffee. Not acceptable.
Great place to relax. The momo here are also surprisingly good alongside the coffee.
Decent coffee. Nothing extraordinary but a reliable option in Majitar.
The interior is very cozy. Staff are friendly and the menu has good variety for a small cafe.
Love this place! Come here every time I visit Majitar. The filter coffee is fantastic.
Felt cheated by the portion sizes. Very small serving for the price charged.
Had their cheese burst pizza and it was absolutely divine. The cheese pull was real and the crust was perfectly crispy. Best pizza in Majitar without doubt.
Ordered the cheesy pasta and the chocolate lava cake for dessert. Both were outstanding. This place is a hidden gem for dessert lovers in Sikkim.
Finally a cafe in Majitar that does proper desserts. The cheesecake was creamy and not overly sweet. Paired beautifully with their filter coffee.
The four cheese pizza here is something else. Gooey, rich and filling. Came here specifically after reading about it online and it did not disappoint.
Tried the brownie with ice cream and the loaded cheesy fries. Both were excellent. This cafe understands comfort food very well.
Great dessert menu compared to other places in Majitar. The tiramisu and the double chocolate mousse are must tries. Would love more pizza variety though.
The pizza was decent but a bit too salty for my taste. The desserts however were spot on. The caramel custard was silky smooth.
Not impressed with the cheesy garlic bread. It was soggy and the cheese was not properly melted. Expected much better from a cafe that promotes it so much.
Came here craving something cheesy and sweet after a long drive. The cheese pizza and walnut brownie hit exactly the right spot. Highly recommended for such cravings.
The mac and cheese bowl is a generous portion and absolutely delicious. Rich, creamy and very cheesy. Perfect rainy day comfort food.
Best grilled chicken I have had in Sikkim. The BBQ platter is absolutely worth it.
Very tasty grilled food. The BBQ sauce is homemade and flavourful. Must visit.
Good food and nice atmosphere. The grilled fish was cooked perfectly. Will come again.
Food quality has gone down recently. The grilled items were dry and overcooked last time.
Decent place for a group dinner. Portion sizes are good and the grill menu is extensive.
Service was rude and inattentive. Had to call the waiter multiple times. Food was okay.
One of the better restaurants in the area. The BBQ pork ribs are amazing.
Average experience overall. Nothing special but the grilled paneer was decent.
Great ambiance for evenings. The outdoor seating area near the grill is a nice touch.
Food came cold even though we could see it on the grill station. Very disappointing.
Excellent place! The chicken tikka and seekh kebab are standout dishes here.
Okay food. The grilled items tasted like they were reheated. Expected fresher quality.
Loved the whole dining experience. Friendly staff, great food, good prices.
Too oily. Almost every dish had excessive oil which made it difficult to enjoy.
Food quality is really poor. The thali was bland and the rice was undercooked.
Nice and cozy atmosphere as the name suggests. The dal makhani was well prepared.
Terrible experience. Found a hair in my food and the staff showed no concern when complained.
Simple local food done well. The veg meals are affordable and filling.
Average restaurant. Nothing to write home about but serves its purpose if you are hungry.
Loved the local Sikkimese dishes here. The gundruk soup and chhurpi snacks were authentic.
The hygiene standards are poor. The tables were dirty and the utensils looked unwashed.
Friendly owner who personally comes to check on guests. The food is home cooked and tasty.
Okay food. The prices are reasonable but do not expect great quality.
Very disappointing. The menu shown online does not match what is actually available.
One of my go-to spots in Majitar. Simple, honest food at fair prices.
The chicken curry was extremely spicy and not in a good way. Could not finish it.
Beautiful restaurant with a great view of the Teesta river. Food quality matches the ambiance.
Stayed at the hotel and had all meals here. Consistent quality and excellent service.
Good food but a bit pricey. Worth it for special occasions or if staying at the hotel.
The breakfast buffet is excellent. Wide variety and everything is fresh and well-prepared.
Overpriced for the quantity. The portions are small for a hotel restaurant charging these rates.
Wonderful dining experience. The staff are professional and the Indian and Chinese food is top notch.
Average hotel restaurant food. Nothing that stands out but safely edible and clean.
Great location by the river. The food complements the scenic setting well.
Service was slow during peak hours. Had to wait 40 minutes for lunch which is too long.
Highly recommend the thukpa and momos here. Authentic Sikkimese flavors in a comfortable setting.
The continental breakfast was fresh and well presented. Great start to a day in Majitar.
The river view from the dining area is stunning. Food was good quality for a hotel setup.
Excellent local cuisine. The sel roti and gundruk were prepared just like home.
Good variety on the menu. The thali meal is filling and very affordable.
Service was quick and friendly. Food was hot and arrived within 15 minutes. Impressed.
Decent food but nothing extraordinary. Reliable for a regular meal in Majitar.
The Tibetan style noodles were well seasoned. A must try for noodle lovers in Majitar.
Very slow service and the food was cold when it arrived. Will not return.
Great home-style cooking. Feels like a didi's kitchen. Loved every bite of the meal.
Average quality food. The curry lacked depth of flavor and the rice was too dry.
Hygienic and clean restaurant. One of the better maintained eateries in Majitar.
Portions are huge here. Definitely worth the price and very filling. Loved the experience.
The owner is rude and dismissive. Food was okay but the attitude ruined the experience.
Reasonable prices for the quality offered. Good for budget travelers passing through Majitar.
Comfortable seating and well lit restaurant. The veg thali is simple but satisfying.
The food is consistently good every time I visit. Staff remember regular customers.
Stayed nearby and ate here daily. The food is consistent and the staff are helpful.
Very average experience. Nothing special but it works when you need a quick meal.
Great value for money. The full meal thali is affordable and very filling.
The noodle soup here is incredible during cold evenings. Perfect comfort food.
Poor service and mediocre food. The waiter was dismissive and the food arrived late.
Reliable place for a decent meal. Not fancy but clean and the food tastes good.
Loved the momos here. Steamed and fried options both available and both excellent.
The Tibetan bread with butter tea is a nice morning option. Enjoyed the local touch.
Bland food and no ambiance. Feels like eating in a canteen rather than a restaurant.
Decent stop if you are passing through. Do not go out of your way but it is fine.
Eating by the Teesta river while having chai and pakoras is an experience you cannot beat.
Simple dhaba food done right. The aloo paratha with curd is exactly what you need after a long drive.
The fish curry here is fresh from the river and absolutely delicious. Highly recommended.
Good roadside dhaba. Basic food but the location beside the river makes it special.
Hygienic concerns. The cooking area is exposed and not very clean. Ate here once, will not return.
A classic dhaba experience. The rajma chawal is comforting and the staff are friendly.
Very basic food and service. It is what you expect from a roadside dhaba so no complaints.
Loved the rustic feel of this place. The chai here is the best in Majitar without question.
Friendly owner who knows regular customers. The food has a homely taste that I love.
Okay for a quick snack but would not recommend for a full meal. Very limited options.
The flies around the seating area were a big problem. Need to improve cleanliness.
Magical spot. Sitting riverside, watching the Teesta flow while eating hot momos is unbeatable.

I was craving something really cheesy and indulgent. Ordered the cheese burst pizza and followed it with a chocolate lava cake. Absolutely satisfied my craving. This is the place to come for cheesy comfort food and desserts in Majitar.

My friend wanted pizza and I wanted dessert so Coffee Break was the obvious choice. The pizza crust had the right amount of cheese and the brownie sundae was rich and creamy. Perfect for our mixed cravings.

Visited specifically for their dessert menu after reading reviews. The cheesecake slice was thick and creamy and the cold brew coffee paired with it perfectly. Highly recommend for anyone with a sweet tooth in Majitar.

Came here for pizza and stayed for the desserts. The loaded cheese pizza was excellent but what really impressed me was the chocolate mousse cup. Rich and not too sweet. Will definitely return for both.
If you are looking for pizza and desserts in Majitar, Coffee Break is the only real option and it delivers well. The four-cheese pizza is the star. Service is slow but the food makes up for it.
Ordered the mac and cheese bowl on a cold evening and it was exactly what I needed. Creamy, cheesy and served hot. The caramel dessert cup on the side made it a perfect meal.
Came here specifically for authentic Sikkimese food. The gundruk soup was perfectly sour and the chhurpi snack was exactly as my grandmother used to make it. This is the real deal for local cuisine.

Our whole family wanted to eat traditional Sikkimese food and Sangay delivered beautifully. The sel roti was crispy and fresh, the kinema curry was authentic, and the staff were very welcoming. Perfect for a family seeking local flavors.
A vegetarian group of us wanted proper local food without any fuss. Cozy Corner gave us exactly that. The veg thali with gundruk and dal was filling, affordable and tasted genuinely homemade.

My group of friends wanted a proper BBQ night. Grill and Chill exceeded every expectation. The mixed grill platter with pork ribs, chicken tikka and seekh kebab was enormous and incredibly flavorful. Perfect for meat lovers in Majitar.

After a long trek we all craved grilled meat and someone recommended Grill and Chill. Best recommendation ever. The BBQ platter was smoky, juicy and the homemade sauce was outstanding. Exactly what tired hikers need.

Wanted a hearty non-vegetarian meal with proper grilled items. Grill and Chill is the best in Majitar for this. The chicken and fish options are both excellent. A must visit for anyone wanting proper grilled food.

My partner and I wanted a romantic dinner with a view. The Hotel Majitar Retreat restaurant overlooking the Teesta river was just perfect. The ambiance was lovely, the food was top quality and the service was excellent. A truly memorable evening.

We just wanted a casual riverside experience with tea and light snacks. The Riverside Dhaba gave us exactly that rustic charm by the Teesta. Chai and pakoras by the river felt magical. Highly recommended for a relaxed riverside outing.

Just passing through Majitar and needed a quick affordable meal. Hotel Temi was the perfect stop. Got a full thali for a very reasonable price, it was served quickly and it was filling. Great option for budget travelers on the go.

Stopped here during a road trip for a quick chai break. The aloo paratha and curd at the dhaba was incredibly satisfying and very cheap. Perfect roadside stop for travelers who do not want to spend much but want good food.
